verification.target_vocab_notes: はる appears in kana form
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, に particle, を particle, の nominalization (twice), た form. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses double nominalization structure (はるのをわすれた). Multiple particles and embedded clauses. Advanced N5.
verification.overall_notes: Complex N5 sentence with nominalization pattern but all grammar is N5-level

verification.target_vocab_notes: 貼る appears in kanji form
verification.grammar_notes: Uses を particle, 前に (before) temporal expression, に particle, を particle, の nominalization, を particle, た form. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses temporal 前に expression and nominalization. Multiple embedded clauses. Advanced N5 structure.
verification.overall_notes: Complex but appropriate N5 example with temporal expression

verification.target_vocab_notes: 貼る appears in kanji form
verification.grammar_notes: Uses が particle, て form, 欲しい (want), と quotation, た form, に particle, を particle, の nominalization, を particle, ないで, ね particle. て form + 欲しい is N5 level desire pattern.
verification.difficulty_notes: Very complex sentence with embedded relative clause, quotation, nominalization, and multiple particles. At upper limit of N5 complexity with long sentence structure.
verification.overall_notes: Upper limit of N5 complexity but all grammar patterns are N5-level

verification.target_vocab_notes: はる appears in kana form (切手貼る)
verification.grammar_notes: Uses が particle, の particle, ておく pattern, た form, に particle, さ filler particle, の nominalization, ないで, よ particle. The ておく pattern (do in advance) is borderline but acceptable for basic N5 usage.
verification.difficulty_notes: Very complex and colloquial with さ particle, ておく pattern, and casual speech style. Multiple embedded clauses. Upper limit of N5.
verification.overall_notes: ておく pattern is borderline N4+ but used in basic context. Very colloquial style may be challenging for beginners.

verification.target_vocab_notes: たばこ appears clearly at sentence start
verification.grammar_notes: Uses を particle, ない form, の question particle. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple negative question. Straightforward N5 structure with basic vocabulary.
verification.overall_notes: Good straightforward N5 example

verification.target_vocab_notes: たばこ appears at sentence start
verification.grammar_notes: Uses を particle, ないで, 欲しい (want), のです explanatory form, が particle. The ないでほしい pattern (want someone not to do) is N5 level.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses complex desire expression with negative and explanatory のです. Multiple patterns combined. Advanced N5.
verification.overall_notes: Complex N5 sentence with polite request pattern

verification.target_vocab_notes: たばこ appears as topic
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, に particle, i-adjective, よ particle. Basic N5 pattern.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple statement about health. Straightforward N5 with basic vocabulary.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent simple N5 example

verification.target_vocab_notes: 涼しい appears modifying 夏
verification.grammar_notes: Uses i-adjective, は particle, 好き, です, か question. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple preference question. Straightforward N5 structure.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with preference pattern

verification.target_vocab_notes: 涼しい appears as predicate
verification.kana_notes: Shows こんにちは (konnichiwa - hello) but should be きょう (kyou) for 今日. Completely wrong reading that changes the meaning.
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, i-adjective, です. Basic N5 pattern.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple weather statement. Basic N5 structure.
verification.overall_notes: Major kana error - こんにちは vs きょう. Must be corrected despite good grammar.

verification.target_vocab_notes: すずしい appears in kana form
verification.kana_notes: Shows こんにちは but should be きょう for 今日. Same error as previous example.
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, 少し adverb, i-adjective. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple weather statement with adverb. Basic N5 structure.
verification.overall_notes: Major kana error needs correction

verification.target_vocab_notes: すずしい appears in kana form
verification.kana_notes: Shows こんにちは but should be きょう. Same kana error repeated.
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, 少し adverb, i-adjective. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple weather statement, identical to example_index 2.
verification.overall_notes: Duplicate of example_index 2 with same major kana error. Should be removed.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 昨日 appears as time expression
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, time word, を particle, た form. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple past action with time word. Straightforward N5 structure.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent straightforward N5 example

verification.target_vocab_notes: 昨日 appears as time expression
verification.grammar_notes: Uses time word, に particle, た form. Basic N5 pattern.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple past action statement. Basic vocabulary and structure.
verification.overall_notes: Good simple N5 example

verification.target_vocab_notes: 昨日 appears as time expression
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, time word, を particle, ました form. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple past action with polite form. Straightforward N5.
verification.overall_notes: Clean N5 example with polite form

verification.target_vocab_notes: きのう appears in kana within quotation
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, quotation marks 「」, を particle, で particle, た form, と quotation particle, た form. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses direct quotation with quotation marks and と particle. Multiple clauses and reported speech. Advanced N5.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with quotation pattern

verification.target_vocab_notes: きのう appears in kana form
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, time word, が particle, i-adjective past tense. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple past state description. Straightforward N5 with i-adjective past.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with adjective past tense

verification.target_vocab_notes: きのう appears in kana within relative clause
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, が particle, time word, た form (relative clause modifying カメラ), です. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses relative clause to modify noun. Mid-level N5 with embedded clause structure.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with relative clause pattern

verification.target_vocab_notes: せっけん appears clearly. NOTE: The meaning listed is 'economy' but せっけん means 'soap' not economy. This is a data error.
verification.grammar_notes: Uses で particle (means/instrument), を particle, ました form. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple action statement with instrumental で. Straightforward N5 structure.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example but note the meaning field has an error (should be 'soap' not 'economy')

verification.target_vocab_notes: はじめた appears as compound verb (洗いはじめた - started washing)
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, を particle, から particle, verb stem + はじめた compound verb pattern. This compound verb pattern (verb stem + 始める) is N5 level.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses compound verb はじめる and から particle for starting point. Mid-level N5 with multiple particles.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with compound verb pattern

verification.target_vocab_notes: はじめた appears as compound verb (洗いはじめた)
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, を particle, verb stem + はじめた compound verb. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple past action with compound verb. Mid-level N5 structure.
verification.overall_notes: Clean N5 example with compound verb

verification.target_vocab_notes: はじめた appears as compound verb (降りはじめた)
verification.kana_notes: Shows おりはじめた but 降る is typically read as ふる not おる. Should be ふりはじめた not おりはじめた.
verification.grammar_notes: Uses が particle, verb stem + はじめた compound verb. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple weather statement with compound verb. Mid-level N5.
verification.overall_notes: Kana error - 降る should be read as ふる not おる. Needs correction.
